metadata.description: AIR OS plugin/skill catalog (E:\-7-) — shareable Claude Code plugins and skills, kept separate from the private runtime/models on E:\-4-.

plugins.name: site-builder
plugins.description: Brief-in, website-out: dynamic Next.js site scaffolder with vendored UI/UX Pro Max design skills + shadcn/ui + Framer Motion, optional Glif MCP for generated visuals.

plugins.name: markitdown
plugins.description: Convert PDFs/Office docs/images to Markdown locally before reading them into the model — save tokens, keep sensitive files off cloud extractors. Recipe wrapping the local MarkItDown install (E:\-4-).

plugins.name: legal-analysis
plugins.description: Verification-first review of legal documents: local text extraction, decomposition into checkable theses, verification of every legal qualification against the primary source, and knowledge cards marked verified or candidate.
